title: On Solving the Multiple Variable Gapped Longest Common Subsequence Problem
summary: This paper addresses the Variable Gapped Longest Common Subsequence (VGLCS) problem, a generalization of the classical LCS problem involving flexible gap constraints between consecutive solutions' characters. The problem arises in molecular sequence comparison, where structural distance constraints between residues must be respected, and in time-series analysis where events are required to occur within specified temporal delays. We propose a search framework based on the root-based state graph representation, in which the state space comprises a generally large number of rooted state subgraphs. To cope with the resulting combinatorial explosion, an iterative beam search strategy is employed, dynamically maintaining a global pool of promising candidate root nodes, enabling effective control of diversification across iterations. To exploit the search for high-quality solutions, several known heuristics from the LCS literature are utilized into the standalone beam search procedure. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first comprehensive computational study on the VGLCS problem comprising 320 synthetic instances with up to 10 input sequences and up to 500 characters. Experimental results show robustness of the designed approach over the baseline beam search in comparable runtimes.

AI.tldr: 提出基于根节点状态图表示的搜索框架，采用迭代波束搜索策略解决VGLCS问题，在包含10条序列、500字符的320个合成实例上验证了方法的鲁棒性。
AI.motivation: 解决VGLCS问题，该问题是经典LCS问题的泛化，涉及连续解字符间的灵活间隙约束。该问题在分子序列比较（需要遵守残基间的结构距离约束）和时间序列分析（事件需要在指定时间延迟内发生）中具有重要应用价值。
AI.method: 提出基于根节点状态图表示的搜索框架，状态空间包含大量根节点状态子图。采用迭代波束搜索策略，动态维护有希望的候选根节点的全局池，有效控制迭代间的多样性。将LCS文献中的多种启发式方法集成到独立的波束搜索过程中。
AI.result: 在320个合成实例（最多10条输入序列，最多500字符）上进行了首次全面的计算研究。实验结果表明，所设计的方法在可比运行时间内比基准波束搜索具有更好的鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 提出的基于根节点状态图表示的迭代波束搜索框架能够有效解决VGLCS问题，在合成实例上表现出良好的性能，为这一具有实际应用价值的问题提供了首个全面的计算研究方案。

title: Beyond One Output: Visualizing and Comparing Distributions of Language Model Generations
summary: Users typically interact with and evaluate language models via single outputs, but each output is just one sample from a broad distribution of possible completions. This interaction hides distributional structure such as modes, uncommon edge cases, and sensitivity to small prompt changes, leading users to over-generalize from anecdotes when iterating on prompts for open-ended tasks. Informed by a formative study with researchers who use LMs (n=13) examining when stochasticity matters in practice, how they reason about distributions over language, and where current workflows break down, we introduce GROVE. GROVE is an interactive visualization that represents multiple LM generations as overlapping paths through a text graph, revealing shared structure, branching points, and clusters while preserving access to raw outputs. We evaluate across three crowdsourced user studies (N=47, 44, and 40 participants) targeting complementary distributional tasks. Our results support a hybrid workflow: graph summaries improve structural judgments such as assessing diversity, while direct output inspection remains stronger for detail-oriented questions.

AI.tldr: GROVE是一个交互式可视化工具，通过文本图表示多个语言模型生成结果，揭示共享结构、分支点和聚类，帮助用户理解语言模型的分布特性。
AI.motivation: 用户通常通过单一输出来评估语言模型，但这隐藏了分布结构（如模式、边缘案例、对提示微小变化的敏感性），导致用户从轶事中过度泛化。现有工作流程在处理语言分布时存在不足。
AI.method: 首先进行形成性研究（n=13）了解实践中随机性的重要性、用户如何推理语言分布以及当前工作流程的不足。然后开发GROVE，将多个LM生成表示为文本图中的重叠路径，揭示共享结构、分支点和聚类，同时保留对原始输出的访问。
AI.result: 通过三个众包用户研究（N=47、44、40）评估，结果显示混合工作流程：图摘要改进了结构判断（如评估多样性），而直接输出检查在细节导向问题上更强。
AI.conclusion: GROVE通过可视化语言模型的分布特性，帮助用户更好地理解和评估语言模型的行为，支持混合工作流程以平衡结构洞察和细节分析。

title: ARES: Adaptive Red-Teaming and End-to-End Repair of Policy-Reward System
summary:
Reinforcement Learning from Human Feedback (RLHF) is central to aligning Large Language Models (LLMs), yet it introduces a critical vulnerability: an imperfect Reward Model (RM) can become a single point of failure when it fails to penalize unsafe behaviors. While existing red-teaming approaches primarily target policy-level weaknesses, they overlook what we term systemic weaknesses cases where both the core LLM and the RM fail in tandem.
  We present ARES, a framework that systematically discovers and mitigates such dual vulnerabilities. ARES employs a ``Safety Mentor'' that dynamically composes semantically coherent adversarial prompts by combining structured component types (topics, personas, tactics, goals) and generates corresponding malicious and safe responses. This dual-targeting approach exposes weaknesses in both the core LLM and the RM simultaneously. Using the vulnerabilities gained, ARES implements a two-stage repair process: first fine-tuning the RM to better detect harmful content, then leveraging the improved RM to optimize the core model. Experiments across multiple adversarial safety benchmarks demonstrate that ARES substantially enhances safety robustness while preserving model capabilities, establishing a new paradigm for comprehensive RLHF safety alignment.

AI.tldr: ARES框架系统性地发现和修复RLHF对齐中的双重漏洞，通过"安全导师"生成对抗性提示暴露核心LLM和奖励模型的共同弱点，然后两阶段修复提升安全性
AI.motivation: 现有RLHF对齐方法存在关键漏洞：不完美的奖励模型可能成为单点故障，无法惩罚不安全行为。现有红队方法主要针对策略级弱点，忽略了核心LLM和奖励模型同时失效的系统性弱点
AI.method: ARES框架包含：1) "安全导师"动态组合语义连贯的对抗性提示（主题、角色、策略、目标），生成恶意和安全响应；2) 双重目标攻击同时暴露核心LLM和奖励模型的弱点；3) 两阶段修复：先微调奖励模型以更好检测有害内容，再利用改进的奖励模型优化核心模型
AI.result: 在多个对抗性安全基准测试中，ARES显著增强了安全鲁棒性，同时保持了模型能力，为全面的RLHF安全对齐建立了新范式
AI.conclusion: ARES通过系统性发现和修复核心LLM与奖励模型的共同弱点，解决了RLHF对齐中的关键漏洞，为更全面的安全对齐提供了有效框架

title: Compile to Compress: Boosting Formal Theorem Provers by Compiler Outputs
summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated significant potential in formal theorem proving, yet state-of-the-art performance often necessitates prohibitive test-time compute via massive roll-outs or extended context windows. In this work, we address this scalability bottleneck by exploiting an informative structure in formal verification: the observation that compilers map a vast space of diverse proof attempts to a compact set of structured failure modes. We introduce a learning-to-refine framework that leverages this compression to perform efficient learning and proof exploration. We perform tree search that corrects errors locally conditioned on explicit verifier feedback, thereby circumventing the costs associated with accumulating a long history of proof attempts. Extensive evaluations show that our method consistently amplifies the reasoning capabilities of base provers across varying scales. Notably, our approach achieves state-of-the-art performance on PutnamBench among publicly reported $\sim$8B and $\sim$32B parameter models under comparable test-time budgets, offering a scalable paradigm for next-generation verifier-guided reasoning.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于学习到精炼的框架，利用编译器将多样化证明尝试映射到结构化失败模式的压缩特性，通过局部错误修正和显式验证器反馈实现高效定理证明，避免长历史证明尝试的成本。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在形式定理证明中展现出潜力，但最先进性能通常需要通过大规模展开或扩展上下文窗口来获得，这带来了可扩展性瓶颈。需要解决测试时计算成本过高的问题。
AI.method: 引入学习到精炼框架，利用编译器将多样化证明尝试映射到结构化失败模式的压缩特性。执行树搜索，基于显式验证器反馈局部修正错误，避免累积长历史证明尝试的成本。
AI.result: 该方法在不同规模上持续增强基础证明器的推理能力。在PutnamBench上，在可比较的测试时预算下，约8B和约32B参数模型达到了公开报告中的最先进性能。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为下一代验证器引导的推理提供了一个可扩展的范式，通过利用形式验证中的信息结构，解决了大型语言模型在定理证明中的可扩展性瓶颈。

title: AI scientists produce results without reasoning scientifically
summary: Large language model (LLM)-based systems are increasingly deployed to conduct scientific research autonomously, yet whether their reasoning adheres to the epistemic norms that make scientific inquiry self-correcting is poorly understood. Here, we evaluate LLM-based scientific agents across eight domains, spanning workflow execution to hypothesis-driven inquiry, through more than 25,000 agent runs and two complementary lenses: (i) a systematic performance analysis that decomposes the contributions of the base model and the agent scaffold, and (ii) a behavioral analysis of the epistemological structure of agent reasoning. We observe that the base model is the primary determinant of both performance and behavior, accounting for 41.4% of explained variance versus 1.5% for the scaffold. Across all configurations, evidence is ignored in 68% of traces, refutation-driven belief revision occurs in 26%, and convergent multi-test evidence is rare. The same reasoning pattern appears whether the agent executes a computational workflow or conducts hypothesis-driven inquiry. They persist even when agents receive near-complete successful reasoning trajectories as context, and the resulting unreliability compounds across repeated trials in epistemically demanding domains. Thus, current LLM-based agents execute scientific workflows but do not exhibit the epistemic patterns that characterize scientific reasoning. Outcome-based evaluation cannot detect these failures, and scaffold engineering alone cannot repair them. Until reasoning itself becomes a training target, the scientific knowledge produced by such agents cannot be justified by the process that generated it.

AI.tldr: LLM-based科学代理在科学推理中缺乏必要的认知规范，主要依赖基础模型而非代理框架，表现出忽视证据、缺乏反驳驱动信念修正等认知缺陷。
AI.motivation: 评估LLM-based科学代理是否遵循使科学探究具有自我修正能力的认知规范，理解其在科学推理中的实际表现与局限性。
AI.method: 通过超过25,000次代理运行，在八个领域评估LLM-based科学代理，采用两种互补视角：系统性性能分析（分解基础模型和代理框架的贡献）和行为分析（考察代理推理的认知结构）。
AI.result: 基础模型是性能和行为的首要决定因素（解释41.4%方差 vs 框架的1.5%）；68%的推理轨迹忽视证据，仅26%出现反驳驱动信念修正，多测试收敛证据罕见；这些认知模式在不同任务中一致存在，即使在提供近乎完整的成功推理轨迹作为上下文时仍然持续。
AI.conclusion: 当前LLM-based代理能够执行科学工作流程，但缺乏科学推理的认知模式；基于结果的评估无法检测这些失败，仅靠框架工程无法修复；除非推理本身成为训练目标，否则此类代理产生的科学知识无法通过其生成过程获得正当性。

title: Easy Samples Are All You Need: Self-Evolving LLMs via Data-Efficient Reinforcement Learning
summary: Previous LLMs-based RL studies typically follow either supervised learning with high annotation costs, or unsupervised paradigms using voting or entropy-based rewards. However, their performance remains far from satisfactory due to the substantial annotation cost and issues such as model collapse or reward hacking. To address these issues, we introduce a new perspective inspired by cognitive learning theory and propose a novel approach called EasyRL. The core of EasyRL is to simulate the human cognitive acquisition curve by integrating reliable knowledge transfer from easy labeled data with a progressive divide-and-conquer strategy that tackles increasingly difficult unlabeled data. Specifically, we initialize a warm-up model using supervised RL with few-shot labeled data. This is followed by a divide-and-conquer pseudo-labeling strategy on difficult unlabeled data, combining consistency-based selection for low-uncertainty cases and reflection-based resolution for medium-uncertainty cases. Finally, difficulty-progressive self-training with iterative pseudo-labeling and RL further strengthens the model's reasoning capability. EasyRL provides a unified self-evolving framework that facilitates data-efficient post-training of LLMs. Experimental results on mathematical and scientific benchmarks demonstrate that EasyRL, using only 10% of easy labeled data, consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines.

AI.tldr: EasyRL：一种基于认知学习理论的新RL方法，通过从易到难的数据渐进学习和伪标签策略，仅需10%标注数据即可超越SOTA基线
AI.motivation: 现有LLM-based RL方法存在标注成本高、模型崩溃或奖励黑客等问题，性能远未达到满意水平。需要一种更高效、数据利用率更高的方法来解决这些问题。
AI.method: 1. 基于认知学习理论，模拟人类认知获取曲线；2. 使用少量标注数据进行监督RL初始化；3. 对困难未标注数据采用分而治之的伪标签策略：低不确定性使用一致性选择，中等不确定性使用反思解决；4. 难度渐进的自训练结合迭代伪标签和RL增强推理能力。
AI.result: 在数学和科学基准测试中，EasyRL仅使用10%的易标注数据，就能持续超越最先进的基线方法。
AI.conclusion: EasyRL提供了一个统一的自进化框架，促进了LLM的数据高效后训练，有效解决了标注成本高和模型性能不足的问题。

title: Sparse Network Inference under Imperfect Detection and its Application to Ecological Networks
summary: Recovering latent structure from count data has received considerable attention in network inference, particularly when one seeks both cross-group interactions and within-group similarity patterns in bipartite networks, which is widely used in ecology research. Such networks are often sparse and inherently imperfect in their detection. Existing models mainly focus on interaction recovery, while the induced similarity graphs are much less studied. Moreover, sparsity is often not controlled, and scale is unbalanced, leading to oversparse or poorly rescaled estimates with degrading structural recovery. To address these issues, we propose a framework for structured sparse nonnegative low-rank factorization with detection probability estimation. We impose nonconvex $\ell_{1/2}$ regularization on the latent similarity and connectivity structures to promote sparsity within-group similarity and cross-group connectivity with better relative scale. The resulting optimization problem is nonconvex and nonsmooth. To solve it, we develop an ADMM-based algorithm with adaptive penalization and scale-aware initialization and establish its asymptotic feasibility and KKT stationarity of cluster points under mild regularity conditions. Experiments on synthetic and real-world ecological datasets demonstrate improved recovery of latent factors and similarity/connectivity structure relative to existing baselines.

AI.tldr: 提出一个用于稀疏非负低秩分解的框架，通过ℓ₁/₂正则化促进组内相似性和组间连接性的稀疏性，并估计检测概率，以改进生态网络中潜在结构的恢复。
AI.motivation: 现有模型主要关注交互恢复，而对诱导的相似性图研究较少；稀疏性往往不受控制，尺度不平衡导致估计过稀疏或缩放不当，从而降低结构恢复质量。
AI.method: 提出结构化稀疏非负低秩分解框架，对潜在相似性和连接性结构施加非凸ℓ₁/₂正则化，以促进组内相似性和组间连接性的稀疏性；开发基于ADMM的自适应惩罚和尺度感知初始化算法。
AI.result: 在合成和真实生态数据集上的实验表明，相对于现有基线方法，该方法在潜在因子和相似性/连接性结构的恢复方面有显著改进。
AI.conclusion: 该框架通过控制稀疏性和平衡尺度，有效解决了生态网络分析中潜在结构恢复的问题，为稀疏计数数据的结构化建模提供了有效工具。

title: CCOpt: an Open-Source Solver for Large-Scale Mathematical Programs with Complementarity Constraints
summary: This paper presents the Julia package CCOpt, built on top of the interior-point solver MadNLP. CCOpt implements a suite of algorithms for Mathematical Programs with Complementarity Constraints (MPCCs). The solver additionally comes with interfaces for use in Matlab, Python, and C++. MPCCs have recently gained renewed attention in engineering optimization, as complementarity provides a powerful modeling tool for nonsmooth functions and logical conditions. These problems are inherently challenging since their nonlinear programming reformulations violate classical regularity conditions at all feasible points, complicating both theoretical analysis and numerical treatment. Consequently, specialized algorithms are required to handle this degeneracy, and several approaches have been proposed. We implement a toolbox of methods, including relaxation and penalty approaches, as well as a crossover to recently proposed active-set methods. Our solver is based on nonlinear interior-point algorithms that couple the relaxation or penalty parameter with the barrier parameter, yielding substantial speedups compared to standard implementations. Both monotone and nonmonotone strategies for updating this joint parameter update are proposed and investigated.In addition, we propose regularization techniques that improve the conditioning of the KKT system for small relaxation parameters, enhancing robustness and computational efficiency. The implementation is validated on the classical MacMPEC benchmark, large-scale problems in security-constrained optimal power flow, optimal control of nonsmooth systems, as well as on quadratic programs with complementarity constraints arising in model predictive control. This benchmarking reveals an algorithmically driven improvement of often an entire order of magnitude over other methods, including commercial solvers.

AI.tldr: CCOpt是一个基于MadNLP的Julia包，专门用于求解带有互补约束的数学规划问题，实现了松弛、惩罚和主动集方法等多种算法，在多个应用领域展现出比商业求解器快一个数量级的性能优势。
AI.motivation: 互补约束数学规划在工程优化中重新受到关注，因为互补性为建模非光滑函数和逻辑条件提供了强大工具。然而，这类问题的非线性规划重构在所有可行点都违反经典正则性条件，使得理论分析和数值处理变得复杂，需要专门算法来处理这种退化性。
AI.method: 基于非线性内点算法，将松弛或惩罚参数与障碍参数耦合，实现单调和非单调的联合参数更新策略。采用正则化技术改善小松弛参数下KKT系统的条件数，提高鲁棒性和计算效率。实现了包括松弛方法、惩罚方法和主动集方法交叉在内的工具箱。
AI.result: 在经典MacMPEC基准测试、大规模安全约束最优潮流、非光滑系统最优控制以及模型预测控制中出现的二次规划互补约束问题上进行验证。结果显示，相比其他方法（包括商业求解器），算法驱动的改进通常达到一个数量级的速度提升。
AI.conclusion: CCOpt提供了一个高效的互补约束数学规划求解器，通过创新的参数耦合策略和正则化技术，显著提升了求解性能，在多个实际工程应用中展现出卓越的计算效率。

title: Quantum inspired qubit qutrit neural networks for real time financial forecasting
comment: 16 pages, 7 figures. Published in Scientific Reports (2025)
summary: This research investigates the performance and efficacy of machine learning models in stock prediction, comparing Artificial Neural Networks (ANNs), Quantum Qubit-based Neural Networks (QQBNs), and Quantum Qutrit-based Neural Networks (QQTNs). By outlining methodologies, architectures, and training procedures, the study highlights significant differences in training times and performance metrics across models. While all models demonstrate robust accuracies above 70%, the Quantum Qutrit-based Neural Network consistently outperforms with advantages in risk-adjusted returns, measured by the Sharpe ratio, greater consistency in prediction quality through the Information Coefficient, and enhanced robustness under varying market conditions. The QQTN not only surpasses its classical and qubit-based counterparts in multiple quantitative and qualitative metrics but also achieves comparable performance with significantly reduced training times. These results showcase the promising prospects of Quantum Qutrit-based Neural Networks in practical financial applications, where real-time processing is critical. By achieving superior accuracy, efficiency, and adaptability, the proposed models underscore the transformative potential of quantum-inspired approaches, paving the way for their integration into computationally intensive fields.

AI.tldr: 该研究比较了ANN、QQBN和QQTN三种机器学习模型在股票预测中的性能，发现量子qutrit神经网络在准确率、风险调整收益、预测一致性和训练时间方面均表现最优。
AI.motivation: 研究动机是探索量子启发式方法在金融预测中的应用潜力，特别是在需要实时处理的计算密集型领域。通过比较经典神经网络与量子神经网络（qubit和qutrit基础）的性能差异，评估量子方法在股票预测中的实际价值。
AI.method: 研究方法包括：1）设计并实现三种模型架构：人工神经网络（ANN）、量子qubit神经网络（QQBN）和量子qutrit神经网络（QQTN）；2）详细描述各模型的训练流程和参数设置；3）使用股票预测任务作为评估基准；4）采用多种性能指标进行综合评估，包括准确率、Sharpe比率（风险调整收益）、信息系数（预测一致性）以及训练时间。
AI.result: 研究结果显示：1）所有模型准确率均超过70%，表现稳健；2）量子qutrit神经网络（QQTN）在多个指标上表现最佳：风险调整收益（Sharpe比率）更高、预测质量一致性（信息系数）更强、在不同市场条件下更具鲁棒性；3）QQTN在显著减少训练时间的同时实现了可比甚至更优的性能；4）QQTN在实时处理关键的实际金融应用中展现出明显优势。
AI.conclusion: 量子qutrit神经网络在股票预测中展现出卓越的准确性、效率和适应性，超越了经典神经网络和量子qubit神经网络。这些结果表明量子启发式方法在计算密集型领域具有变革潜力，为量子方法在金融等实时处理关键领域的实际应用铺平了道路。

title: FASE : A Fairness-Aware Spatiotemporal Event Graph Framework for Predictive Policing
summary:
Predictive policing systems that allocate patrol resources based solely on predicted crime risk can unintentionally amplify racial disparities through feedback driven data bias. We present FASE, a Fairness Aware Spatiotemporal Event Graph framework, which integrates spatiotemporal crime prediction with fairness constrained patrol allocation and a closed loop deployment feedback simulator.
  We model Baltimore as a graph of 25 ZIP Code Tabulation Areas and use 139,982 Part 1 crime incidents from 2017 to 2019 at hourly resolution, producing a sparse feature tensor. The prediction module combines a spatiotemporal graph neural network with a multivariate Hawkes process to capture spatial dependencies and self exciting temporal dynamics. Outputs are modeled using a Zero Inflated Negative Binomial distribution, suitable for overdispersed and zero heavy crime counts. The model achieves a validation loss of 0.4800 and a test loss of 0.4857.
  Patrol allocation is formulated as a fairness constrained linear optimization problem that maximizes risk weighted coverage while enforcing a Demographic Impact Ratio constraint with deviation bounded by 0.05. Across six simulated deployment cycles, fairness remains within 0.9928 to 1.0262, and coverage ranges from 0.876 to 0.936. However, a persistent detection rate gap of approximately 3.5 percentage points remains between minority and non minority areas. This result shows that allocation level fairness constraints alone do not eliminate feedback induced bias in retraining data, highlighting the need for fairness interventions across the full pipeline.

AI.tldr: FASE框架整合时空犯罪预测与公平约束巡逻分配，通过闭环部署反馈模拟器解决预测警务系统中反馈驱动数据偏见导致的种族差异放大问题。
AI.motivation: 传统预测警务系统仅基于犯罪风险预测分配巡逻资源，可能通过反馈驱动的数据偏见无意中放大种族差异。需要开发一个能够整合预测、公平约束分配和部署反馈模拟的完整框架。
AI.method: FASE框架包含三个核心模块：1) 预测模块结合时空图神经网络与多元Hawkes过程，使用零膨胀负二项分布建模犯罪计数；2) 分配模块将巡逻分配建模为公平约束线性优化问题，最大化风险加权覆盖率并强制人口影响比约束；3) 部署反馈模拟器实现闭环评估。以巴尔的摩25个ZIP码区域为图节点，使用2017-2019年139,982起犯罪事件构建稀疏特征张量。
AI.result: 预测模型验证损失0.4800，测试损失0.4857。在六个模拟部署周期中，公平性保持在0.9928-1.0262范围内，覆盖率在0.876-0.936之间。但少数族裔与非少数族裔区域之间仍存在约3.5个百分点的持续检测率差距。
AI.conclusion: 仅靠分配层面的公平约束无法消除再训练数据中的反馈诱导偏见，需要在全流程中实施公平性干预。FASE框架展示了整合预测、分配和反馈模拟的重要性，为减少预测警务系统中的偏见提供了系统化方法。

title: Beyond Bellman: High-Order Generator Regression for Continuous-Time Policy Evaluation
summary: We study finite-horizon continuous-time policy evaluation from discrete closed-loop trajectories under time-inhomogeneous dynamics. The target value surface solves a backward parabolic equation, but the Bellman baseline obtained from one-step recursion is only first-order in the grid width. We estimate the time-dependent generator from multi-step transitions using moment-matching coefficients that cancel lower-order truncation terms, and combine the resulting surrogate with backward regression. The main theory gives an end-to-end decomposition into generator misspecification, projection error, pooling bias, finite-sample error, and start-up error, together with a decision-frequency regime map explaining when higher-order gains should be visible. Across calibration studies, four-scale benchmarks, feature and start-up ablations, and gain-mismatch stress tests, the second-order estimator consistently improves on the Bellman baseline and remains stable in the regime where the theory predicts visible gains. These results position high-order generator regression as an interpretable continuous-time policy-evaluation method with a clear operating region.

AI.tldr: 提出一种用于连续时间策略评估的二阶估计器，通过多步转移匹配矩系数来抵消低阶截断项，相比贝尔曼基线有理论保证的性能提升
AI.motivation: 研究有限时域连续时间策略评估问题，从离散闭环轨迹中评估时变动态系统。贝尔曼基线方法在网格宽度上只有一阶精度，需要更高阶的估计器来提高精度
AI.method: 使用多步转移通过矩匹配系数估计时间相关生成器，抵消低阶截断项，将生成的代理模型与后向回归结合，得到二阶估计器
AI.result: 理论分析给出端到端误差分解（生成器误设、投影误差、池化偏差、有限样本误差、启动误差）和决策频率机制图；实验表明二阶估计器在多种测试中一致优于贝尔曼基线，在理论预测的增益可见区域保持稳定
AI.conclusion: 高阶生成器回归是一种可解释的连续时间策略评估方法，具有明确的操作区域，二阶估计器在理论预测的增益可见区域提供稳定改进

title: A Dynamic Mode Decomposition Approach to Parameter Identification
comment: 7 pages, 4 figures. Submitted to the 2026 IEEE Conference on Decision and Control
summary: This paper presents a data-driven algorithm for simultaneous system identification and parameter estimation in control-affine nonlinear systems. Parameter estimation is achieved by training a data-driven predictive model using state-action measurements and various known values at the parameters of interest. The predictive model is then used in conjunction with state-action data corresponding to unknown values of the parameters to estimate the said unknown value. Numerical experiments on the controlled Duffing oscillator with unknown damping, stiffness, and nonlinearity coefficients demonstrate accurate recovery of both the system trajectories and the unknown parameter values from data collected under open-loop excitation.

AI.tldr: 提出一种数据驱动算法，用于控制仿射非线性系统的同时系统辨识和参数估计，通过训练数据驱动预测模型来估计未知参数值。
AI.motivation: 控制仿射非线性系统的参数估计是控制理论中的重要问题，传统方法通常需要复杂的数学建模或假设。本文旨在开发一种数据驱动的方法，能够同时进行系统辨识和参数估计，减少对系统先验知识的依赖。
AI.method: 使用状态-动作测量数据和已知参数值训练数据驱动预测模型，然后将该模型应用于未知参数值对应的状态-动作数据，通过数据驱动方法估计未知参数值。算法在开环激励下收集的数据上进行验证。
AI.result: 在受控Duffing振子（具有未知阻尼、刚度和非线性系数）上的数值实验表明，该方法能够从开环激励收集的数据中准确恢复系统轨迹和未知参数值。
AI.conclusion: 该数据驱动算法能够有效实现控制仿射非线性系统的同时系统辨识和参数估计，为复杂非线性系统的参数估计提供了一种实用的数据驱动解决方案。

title: Human-Guided Harm Recovery for Computer Use Agents
summary: As LM agents gain the ability to execute actions on real computer systems, we need ways to not only prevent harmful actions at scale but also effectively remediate harm when prevention fails. We formalize a solution to this neglected challenge in post-execution safeguards as harm recovery: the problem of optimally steering an agent from a harmful state back to a safe one in alignment with human preferences. We ground preference-aligned recovery through a formative user study that identifies valued recovery dimensions and produces a natural language rubric. Our dataset of 1,150 pairwise judgments reveals context-dependent shifts in attribute importance, such as preferences for pragmatic, targeted strategies over comprehensive long-term approaches. We operationalize these learned insights in a reward model, re-ranking multiple candidate recovery plans generated by an agent scaffold at test time. To evaluate recovery capabilities systematically, we introduce BackBench, a benchmark of 50 computer-use tasks that test an agent's ability to recover from harmful states. Human evaluation shows our reward model scaffold yields higher-quality recovery trajectories than base agents and rubric-based scaffolds. Together, these contributions lay the foundation for a new class of agent safety methods -- ones that confront harm not only by preventing it, but by navigating its aftermath with alignment and intent.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了"伤害恢复"作为后执行保障的新范式，通过用户研究识别恢复维度，构建奖励模型来指导智能体从有害状态恢复到安全状态，并创建BackBench基准进行评估。
AI.motivation: 随着语言模型智能体能够在真实计算机系统上执行操作，需要不仅预防有害行为，还要在预防失败时有效修复伤害。现有研究忽视了后执行保障中的恢复问题，需要系统方法指导智能体从有害状态恢复到安全状态。
AI.method: 1) 通过用户研究形式化伤害恢复问题，识别有价值的恢复维度并创建自然语言评估标准；2) 基于1,150对判断构建数据集，分析上下文相关的属性重要性变化；3) 将学习到的洞察操作化为奖励模型，在测试时对智能体生成的多个候选恢复计划进行重排序；4) 引入BackBench基准，包含50个计算机使用任务，系统评估恢复能力。
AI.result: 用户研究揭示了恢复偏好的上下文依赖性，如更倾向于实用、有针对性的策略而非全面的长期方法。人类评估显示，奖励模型支架比基础智能体和基于标准的支架产生更高质量的恢复轨迹。BackBench基准为系统评估恢复能力提供了工具。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为智能体安全方法奠定了基础，提出了一类新的安全方法——不仅通过预防来应对伤害，还通过有意识的对齐来导航伤害后果。伤害恢复范式为解决后执行保障中被忽视的挑战提供了系统解决方案。

title: Curiosity-Critic: Cumulative Prediction Error Improvement as a Tractable Intrinsic Reward for World Model Training
summary: Local prediction-error-based curiosity rewards focus on the current transition without considering the world model's cumulative prediction error across all visited transitions. We introduce Curiosity-Critic, which grounds its intrinsic reward in the improvement of this cumulative objective, and show that it reduces to a tractable per-step form: the difference between the current prediction error and the asymptotic error baseline of the current state transition. We estimate this baseline online with a learned critic co-trained alongside the world model; regressing a single scalar, the critic converges well before the world model saturates, redirecting exploration toward learnable transitions without oracle knowledge of the noise floor. The reward is higher for learnable transitions and collapses toward the baseline for stochastic ones, effectively separating epistemic (reducible) from aleatoric (irreducible) prediction error online. Prior prediction-error curiosity formulations, from Schmidhuber (1991) to learned-feature-space variants, emerge as special cases corresponding to specific approximations of this baseline. Experiments on a stochastic grid world show that Curiosity-Critic outperforms prediction-error and visitation-count baselines in convergence speed and final world model accuracy.

AI.tldr: 提出Curiosity-Critic方法，将内在奖励基于世界模型在所有访问转移上的累积预测误差改进，而非仅当前转移的局部预测误差。
AI.motivation: 现有基于局部预测误差的好奇心奖励仅关注当前转移，忽略了世界模型在所有访问转移上的累积预测误差改进。需要一种能在线区分可学习转移（认知误差）与随机转移（偶然误差）的方法。
AI.method: 引入Curiosity-Critic，其内在奖励简化为可处理的每步形式：当前预测误差与当前状态转移的渐近误差基线之差。通过在线学习的critic（与世界模型协同训练）估计该基线，critic回归单个标量，在世界模型饱和前收敛。
AI.result: 在随机网格世界实验中，Curiosity-Critic在收敛速度和最终世界模型准确性方面优于预测误差和访问计数基线方法。奖励对可学习转移更高，对随机转移则趋近基线。
AI.conclusion: Curiosity-Critic能有效在线分离认知（可约）与偶然（不可约）预测误差，将探索导向可学习转移。先前预测误差好奇心公式（从Schmidhuber到学习特征空间变体）可作为该基线特定近似的特例。

title: Fast estimation of Gaussian mixture components via centering and singular value thresholding
summary: Estimating the number of components is a fundamental challenge in unsupervised learning, particularly when dealing with high-dimensional data with many components or severely imbalanced component sizes. This paper addresses this challenge for classical Gaussian mixture models. The proposed estimator is simple: center the data, compute the singular values of the centered matrix, and count those above a threshold. No iterative fitting, no likelihood calculation, and no prior knowledge of the number of components are required. We prove that, under a mild separation condition on the component centers, the estimator consistently recovers the true number of components. The result holds in high-dimensional settings where the dimension can be much larger than the sample size. It also holds when the number of components grows to the smaller of the dimension and the sample size, even under severe imbalance among component sizes. Computationally, the method is extremely fast: for example, it processes ten million samples in one hundred dimensions within one minute. Extensive experimental studies confirm its accuracy in challenging settings such as high dimensionality, many components, and severe class imbalance.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于奇异值阈值的简单高斯混合模型分量数估计方法，无需迭代拟合或似然计算，能处理高维、多分量、严重不平衡数据。
AI.motivation: 无监督学习中估计分量数量是一个基本挑战，特别是在处理高维数据、多分量或分量大小严重不平衡的情况下。现有方法通常需要迭代拟合、似然计算或先验知识。
AI.method: 提出简单估计器：中心化数据，计算中心化矩阵的奇异值，统计超过阈值的奇异值数量。无需迭代拟合、似然计算或分量数先验知识。
AI.result: 在分量中心满足温和分离条件下，估计器能一致恢复真实分量数。结果适用于高维设置（维度可远大于样本量），且分量数可增长到维度与样本量的较小值，即使存在严重不平衡。计算极快（如1分钟内处理100维1000万样本）。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高斯混合模型分量数估计提供了简单、快速、理论保证的解决方案，特别适用于高维、多分量、严重不平衡的挑战性场景。

title: Tropical low-rank approximation and application to optimal control of N-body systems
summary: We study the approximation of the value function of deterministic optimal control problems with fixed initial state, motivated by \(N\)-body systems. In this setting, the action functional consists of local kinetic and potential terms, along with an interaction potential. We exploit this structure to approximate the value function using a tropical tensor of small rank, i.e.\ a supremum of a small number of additively separable functions. We propose a trajectory-based tropical low-rank approximation method. Rather than propagating basis functions globally, as in usual tropical numerical methods, the approximation of the value function is improved only along a sequence of relevant trajectories. The resulting approximations form a monotone family of computable lower bounds for the exact value function, with the tropical tensor rank increasing at most linearly with the number of outer iterations. Under suitable regularity assumptions, we show that at the initial state, and also at the optimal trajectory starting from this state, the lower bounds converge to the exact value. In the $N$-body setting, the generated basis functions remain additively separable across subsystems, thereby yielding a structured tropical low-rank approximation. Numerical experiments on $N$-body systems with Coulomb-type repulsion illustrate the effectiveness of the approach up to state dimension \(200\), within a half hour time budget.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于轨迹的热带低秩张量方法，用于近似确定性最优控制问题的值函数，特别适用于N体系统，能在高维状态空间（达200维）中有效计算。
AI.motivation: 研究确定性最优控制问题中值函数的近似方法，特别针对具有固定初始状态的N体系统。这类问题的动作泛函包含局部动能项、势能项和相互作用势，需要处理高维状态空间的计算挑战。
AI.method: 提出轨迹式热带低秩近似方法：利用问题结构将值函数近似为低秩热带张量（即少量加性可分函数的极大值）。与传统热带数值方法不同，该方法不全局传播基函数，而是沿相关轨迹序列改进值函数近似。生成的近似构成可计算下界序列，热带张量秩随外层迭代次数至多线性增长。
AI.result: 在适当正则性假设下，证明在初始状态及从该状态出发的最优轨迹上，下界收敛到精确值函数。对于N体系统，生成的基函数保持子系统间的加性可分性，从而获得结构化热带低秩近似。数值实验表明，该方法在半小时时间预算内对库仑型排斥的N体系统有效，状态维度可达200。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为高维最优控制问题提供了有效的值函数近似方案，特别适用于具有加性可分结构的N体系统。轨迹式方法避免了全局基函数传播的计算负担，同时保持收敛性保证，在实际计算中展现出良好的可扩展性。

title: From Natural Language to Executable Narsese: A Neuro-Symbolic Benchmark and Pipeline for Reasoning with NARS
summary: Large language models (LLMs) are highly capable at language generation, but they remain unreliable when reasoning requires explicit symbolic structure, multi-step inference, and interpretable uncertainty. This paper presents a neuro-symbolic framework for translating natural-language reasoning problems into executable formal representations using first-order logic (FOL) and Narsese, the language of the Non-Axiomatic Reasoning System (NARS). To support this direction, we introduce NARS-Reasoning-v0.1, a benchmark of natural-language reasoning problems paired with FOL forms, executable Narsese programs, and three gold labels: True, False, and Uncertain. We develop a deterministic compilation pipeline from FOL to executable Narsese and validate retained examples through runtime execution in OpenNARS for Applications (ONA), ensuring that the symbolic targets are not only syntactically well formed but also behaviorally aligned with the intended answer. We further present Language-Structured Perception (LSP), a formulation in which an LLM is trained to produce reasoning-relevant symbolic structure rather than only a final verbal response. As an initial proof of concept, we also train and release a Phi-2 LoRA adapter on NARS-Reasoning-v0.1 for three-label reasoning classification, showing that the benchmark can support supervised adaptation in addition to executable evaluation. Overall, the paper positions executable symbolic generation and execution-based validation as a practical path toward more reliable neuro-symbolic reasoning systems.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一个神经符号框架，将自然语言推理问题转换为可执行的形式表示（一阶逻辑和Narsese），并创建了NARS-Reasoning-v0.1基准数据集，通过基于执行的验证来提高LLM推理的可靠性。
AI.motivation: 大型语言模型在语言生成方面表现出色，但在需要显式符号结构、多步推理和可解释不确定性的推理任务中仍然不可靠。需要一种方法将自然语言推理问题转化为可执行的形式表示，并通过基于执行的验证来提高推理的可靠性。
AI.method: 1) 提出神经符号框架，将自然语言推理问题翻译为一阶逻辑(FOL)和Narsese（非公理推理系统语言）；2) 创建NARS-Reasoning-v0.1基准数据集，包含自然语言问题、FOL形式、可执行Narsese程序和三个黄金标签（真、假、不确定）；3) 开发从FOL到可执行Narsese的确定性编译管道；4) 在OpenNARS for Applications中通过运行时执行验证保留的示例；5) 提出语言结构化感知(LSP)方法，训练LLM生成推理相关的符号结构而非最终语言响应；6) 训练并发布Phi-2 LoRA适配器用于三标签推理分类。
AI.result: 1) 成功创建了NARS-Reasoning-v0.1基准数据集；2) 开发了从FOL到Narsese的确定性编译管道；3) 通过ONA运行时执行验证了符号目标不仅语法正确，而且行为与预期答案一致；4) 训练了Phi-2 LoRA适配器，证明基准数据集支持监督适应；5) 展示了可执行符号生成和基于执行的验证作为实现更可靠神经符号推理系统的可行路径。
AI.conclusion: 可执行符号生成和基于执行的验证是实现更可靠神经符号推理系统的实用路径。该方法通过将自然语言推理转化为可执行的形式表示，并利用运行时验证确保符号目标的行为一致性，为解决LLM在复杂推理任务中的不可靠性问题提供了有效方案。

title: The Cost of Relaxation: Evaluating the Error in Convex Neural Network Verification
summary: Many neural network (NN) verification systems represent the network's input-output relation as a constraint program. Sound and complete, representations involve integer constraints, for simulating the activations. Recent works convexly relax the integer constraints, improving performance, at the cost of soundness. Convex relaxations consider outputs that are unreachable by the original network. We study the worst case divergence between the original network and its convex relaxations; both qualitatively and quantitatively. The relaxations' space forms a lattice, where the top element corresponds to a full relaxation, with every neuron linearized. The bottom element corresponds to the original network. We provide analytical upper and lower bounds for the $\ell_\infty$-distance between the fully relaxed and original outputs. This distance grows exponentially, w.r.t. the network's depth, and linearly w.r.t. the input's radius. The misclassification probability exhibits a step-like behavior, w.r.t. input radius. Our results are supported by experiments on MNIST, Fashion MNIST and random networks.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了神经网络验证中凸松弛方法的最坏情况误差，分析了完全松弛网络与原始网络输出之间的最大距离及其随网络深度和输入半径的变化规律。
AI.motivation: 神经网络验证系统通常将网络表示为约束程序，完全精确表示需要整数约束但计算代价高。凸松弛方法通过线性化神经元来提高性能，但牺牲了完备性，可能考虑原始网络无法达到的输出。需要研究凸松弛与原始网络之间的最坏情况差异。
AI.method: 将松弛空间建模为格结构，顶部元素是完全松弛（所有神经元线性化），底部元素是原始网络。分析完全松弛与原始网络输出之间的ℓ∞距离上界和下界，研究误分类概率随输入半径的变化。在MNIST、Fashion MNIST和随机网络上进行实验验证。
AI.result: 完全松弛与原始网络输出距离随网络深度呈指数增长，随输入半径呈线性增长。误分类概率随输入半径呈现阶梯状变化。实验支持理论分析结果。
AI.conclusion: 凸松弛方法在神经网络验证中虽然提高了性能，但会引入系统误差，该误差随网络深度指数增长。这为理解凸松弛方法的局限性提供了理论基础，对实际应用中松弛方法的选择有指导意义。

title: Analytical Extraction of Conditional Sobol' Indices via Basis Decomposition of Polynomial Chaos Expansions
summary: In uncertainty quantification, evaluating sensitivity measures under specific conditions (i.e., conditional Sobol' indices) is essential for systems with parameterized responses, such as spatial fields or varying operating conditions. Traditional approaches often rely on point-wise modeling, which is computationally expensive and may lack consistency across the parameter space. This paper demonstrates that for a pre-trained global Polynomial Chaos Expansion (PCE) model, the analytical conditional Sobol' indices are inherently embedded within its basis functions. By leveraging the tensor-product property of PCE bases, we reformulate the global expansion into a set of analytical coefficient fields that depend on the conditioning variables. Based on the preservation of orthogonality under conditional probability measures, we derive closed-form expressions for conditional variances and Sobol' indices. This framework bypasses the need for repetitive modeling or additional sampling, transforming conditional sensitivity analysis into a purely algebraic post-processing step. Numerical benchmarks indicate that the proposed method ensures physical coherence and offers superior numerical robustness and computational efficiency compared to conventional point-wise approaches.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出了一种基于预训练全局多项式混沌展开（PCE）模型的解析条件Sobol'指数计算方法，将条件敏感性分析转化为纯代数后处理步骤，无需重复建模或额外采样。
AI.motivation: 在不确定性量化中，评估特定条件下的敏感性度量（即条件Sobol'指数）对于具有参数化响应的系统（如空间场或变化操作条件）至关重要。传统方法通常依赖逐点建模，计算成本高且可能在参数空间中缺乏一致性。
AI.method: 利用预训练全局PCE模型的张量积基函数特性，将全局展开重构为一组依赖于条件变量的解析系数场。基于条件概率测度下正交性的保持，推导出条件方差和Sobol'指数的闭式表达式。
AI.result: 数值基准测试表明，该方法确保了物理一致性，并在数值鲁棒性和计算效率方面优于传统的逐点方法。将条件敏感性分析转化为纯代数后处理步骤，无需重复建模或额外采样。
AI.conclusion: 对于预训练的全局PCE模型，解析条件Sobol'指数固有地嵌入在其基函数中。通过利用PCE基的张量积特性，可以高效、一致地计算条件敏感性度量，为参数化系统的敏感性分析提供了强大的框架。

title: Target Mirror Descent: A Unifying Framework for Solving Monotone Variational Inequalities
summary: It is well known that mirror descent may diverge or cycle on merely monotone variational inequalities. In this paper, we propose \emph{Target Mirror Descent} (TMD), a unified framework that stabilizes monotone flows via a target point correction mechanism in the dual update. By appropriate design choices, TMD recovers the proximal point algorithm, extragradient methods, splitting methods, Brown-von Neumann-Nash dynamics, forward-backward-forward dynamics, and discounted mirror descent as special cases. Thus, we establish a unified perspective on these landmark algorithms and their convergence. Beyond unification, we leverage the TMD framework to correct an equilibrium misalignment in discounted mirror descent and to generalize its higher-order extension beyond interior solutions. Moreover, a key structural feature of TMD is the explicit decoupling of the mirror map from the target determination, which enables \emph{geometric ensembles}: multiple algorithms solve the same problem in parallel using distinct mirror maps, while sharing a common dual update. We show that such an ensemble rigorously reduces to a single TMD with a synthesized mirror map, and thus inherits these convergence guarantees.

AI.tldr: 提出目标镜像下降(TMD)框架，通过目标点校正机制稳定单调变分不等式中的镜像下降，统一了多种经典算法，并引入几何集成概念。
AI.motivation: 镜像下降在单调变分不等式上可能发散或循环，需要一种统一的稳定化框架来克服这一局限性，并为多种现有算法提供统一的理论视角。
AI.method: 提出目标镜像下降(TMD)框架，在双重更新中引入目标点校正机制，将镜像映射与目标确定显式解耦，通过适当设计选择可恢复多种经典算法。
AI.result: TMD统一了近端点算法、外梯度方法、分裂方法、Brown-von Neumann-Nash动力学、前向后向动力学和折扣镜像下降等算法，纠正了折扣镜像下降的均衡错位问题，并支持几何集成。
AI.conclusion: TMD提供了一个统一的框架来稳定单调流，不仅统一了多种经典算法，还通过几何集成概念实现了多个算法并行求解同一问题，同时保持收敛性保证。

title: How Adversarial Environments Mislead Agentic AI?
comment: Accepted to Findings of the Association for Computational Linguistics: ACL 2026
summary: Tool-integrated agents are deployed on the premise that external tools ground their outputs in reality. Yet this very reliance creates a critical attack surface. Current evaluations benchmark capability in benign settings, asking "can the agent use tools correctly" but never "what if the tools lie". We identify this Trust Gap: agents are evaluated for performance, not for skepticism. We formalize this vulnerability as Adversarial Environmental Injection (AEI), a threat model where adversaries compromise tool outputs to deceive agents. AEI constitutes environmental deception: constructing a "fake world" of poisoned search results and fabricated reference networks around unsuspecting agents. We operationalize this via POTEMKIN, a Model Context Protocol (MCP)-compatible harness for plug-and-play robustness testing. We identify two orthogonal attack surfaces: The Illusion (breadth attacks) poison retrieval to induce epistemic drift toward false beliefs, while The Maze (depth attacks) exploit structural traps to cause policy collapse into infinite loops. Across 11,000+ runs on five frontier agents, we find a stark robustness gap: resistance to one attack often increases vulnerability to the other, demonstrating that epistemic and navigational robustness are distinct capabilities.

AI.tldr: 论文提出"对抗性环境注入"(AEI)威胁模型，揭示AI代理对工具输出的过度信任漏洞，开发POTEMKIN框架进行鲁棒性测试，发现代理在广度攻击和深度攻击之间存在鲁棒性权衡。
AI.motivation: 当前AI代理评估只关注工具使用能力，忽视了工具输出可能被恶意篡改的风险。论文识别出"信任鸿沟"：代理被评估性能而非怀疑能力，这在实际部署中构成严重安全漏洞。
AI.method: 提出对抗性环境注入(AEI)威胁模型，开发POTEMKIN框架（兼容MCP协议）进行即插即用鲁棒性测试。定义两种正交攻击面：广度攻击（幻觉攻击）通过污染检索诱导认知漂移；深度攻击（迷宫攻击）利用结构陷阱导致策略崩溃和无限循环。
AI.result: 在5个前沿代理上进行11,000多次测试，发现显著的鲁棒性差距：对一种攻击的抵抗力往往增加对另一种攻击的脆弱性，表明认知鲁棒性和导航鲁棒性是两种不同的能力。
AI.conclusion: AI代理的安全评估需要从单纯的能力测试转向对抗性鲁棒性测试。认知鲁棒性和导航鲁棒性的权衡表明需要开发更全面的安全框架，POTEMKIN为此提供了标准化测试平台。

title: Discrete Tilt Matching
summary: Masked diffusion large language models (dLLMs) are a promising alternative to autoregressive generation. While reinforcement learning (RL) methods have recently been adapted to dLLM fine-tuning, their objectives typically depend on sequence-level marginal likelihoods, which are intractable for masked diffusion models. To address this, we derive Discrete Tilt Matching (DTM), a likelihood-free method that recasts dLLM fine-tuning as state-level matching of local unmasking posteriors under reward tilting. DTM takes the form of a weighted cross-entropy objective with explicit minimizer, and admits control variates that improve training stability. On a synthetic maze-planning task, we analyze how DTM's annealing schedule and control variates affect training stability and prevent mode collapse. At scale, fine-tuning LLaDA-8B-Instruct with DTM yields strong gains on Sudoku and Countdown while remaining competitive on MATH500 and GSM8K.

AI.tldr: 提出DTM方法解决扩散大语言模型微调中的似然计算难题，通过状态级局部解掩后验匹配实现奖励倾斜下的稳定训练
AI.motivation: 扩散大语言模型是有前景的自回归生成替代方案，但现有强化学习方法依赖序列级边际似然，这在掩码扩散模型中难以计算
AI.method: 提出离散倾斜匹配（DTM）方法，将dLLM微调重新定义为奖励倾斜下局部解掩后验的状态级匹配，采用带显式最小化器的加权交叉熵目标，并引入控制变量提升训练稳定性
AI.result: 在合成迷宫规划任务中分析了DTM退火计划和控制变量对训练稳定性和模式崩溃的影响；大规模微调LLaDA-8B-Instruct在Sudoku和Countdown上获得显著提升，在MATH500和GSM8K上保持竞争力
AI.conclusion: DTM为掩码扩散大语言模型提供了一种无需似然计算的强化学习微调方法，在保持稳定性的同时实现了任务性能提升

title: Formulation and Analysis for Integrated Spacecraft Routing and Trajectory Design Problem
summary: This paper studies the integrated spacecraft routing and trajectory optimization problem for satellite servicing missions involving partial en-route propellant replenishment. Unlike terrestrial routing problems, spacecraft operate in a dynamic environment, and we need to optimize the spacecraft routing over a network with nonlinear and time-dependent trajectory costs. In this paper, we tackle this problem using two different formulations. The first formulation, referred to as the arc-based formulation, defines variables based on arcs and employs an iterative decoupling scheme that alternates between mixed-integer linear programming and sequential nonlinear trajectory optimization. The second formulation, referred to as the path-based formulation, defines variables based on paths/routes and leverages column generation and a labeling algorithm to accelerate the identification of promising routes. Through a geosynchronous satellite servicing case study and numerical experiments, we quantify the computational trade-offs between these two formulations in terms of the solution optimality, computational time, and robustness against non-converging or trivial solutions.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了涉及途中部分推进剂补充的卫星服务任务中的集成航天器路径规划与轨迹优化问题，提出了两种不同的数学规划方法来解决这一动态环境下的非线性、时间相关成本优化问题。
AI.motivation: 航天器在动态环境中运行，需要优化具有非线性和时间相关轨迹成本的网络中的路径规划。传统的陆地路径规划方法不适用于航天器任务，特别是涉及途中推进剂补充的卫星服务任务。
AI.method: 提出了两种不同的数学规划方法：1) 基于弧的公式，定义基于弧的变量，采用迭代解耦方案，交替使用混合整数线性规划和顺序非线性轨迹优化；2) 基于路径的公式，定义基于路径/路线的变量，利用列生成和标记算法加速有希望路线的识别。
AI.result: 通过地球同步卫星服务案例研究和数值实验，量化了两种公式在解的最优性、计算时间和对不收敛或平凡解的鲁棒性方面的计算权衡。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为涉及途中推进剂补充的卫星服务任务提供了两种有效的集成航天器路径规划与轨迹优化方法，并分析了它们在计算性能方面的权衡，为实际任务规划提供了理论和方法支持。

title: Formally Verified Patent Analysis via Dependent Type Theory: Machine-Checkable Certificates from a Hybrid AI + Lean 4 Pipeline
summary: We present a formally verified framework for patent analysis as a hybrid AI + Lean 4 pipeline. The DAG-coverage core (Algorithm 1b) is fully machine-verified once bounded match scores are fixed. Freedom-to-operate, claim-construction sensitivity, cross-claim consistency, and doctrine-of-equivalents analyses are formalized at the specification level with kernel-checked candidate certificates. Existing patent-analysis approaches rely on manual expert analysis (slow, non-scalable) or ML/NLP methods (probabilistic, opaque, non-compositional). To our knowledge, this is the first framework that applies interactive theorem proving based on dependent type theory to intellectual property analysis. Claims are encoded as DAGs in Lean 4, match strengths as elements of a verified complete lattice, and confidence scores propagate through dependencies via proven-correct monotone functions. We formalize five IP use cases (patent-to-product mapping, freedom-to-operate, claim construction sensitivity, cross-claim consistency, doctrine of equivalents) via six algorithms. Structural lemmas, the coverage-core generator, and the closed-path identity coverage = W_cov are machine-verified in Lean 4. Higher-level theorems for the other use cases remain informal proof sketches, and their proof-generation functions are architecturally mitigated (untrusted generators whose outputs are kernel-checked and sorry-free axiom-audited). Guarantees are conditional on the ML layer: they certify mathematical correctness of computations downstream of ML scores, not the accuracy of the scores themselves. A case study on a synthetic memory-module claim demonstrates weighted coverage and construction-sensitivity analysis. Validation against adjudicated cases is future work.

AI.tldr: 首个基于依赖类型理论的交互式定理证明框架，用于专利分析，将专利权利要求编码为DAG，通过Lean 4实现形式化验证
AI.motivation: 现有专利分析方法依赖人工专家分析（慢、不可扩展）或ML/NLP方法（概率性、不透明、非组合性），缺乏形式化验证的数学保证
AI.method: 将专利权利要求编码为Lean 4中的DAG，匹配强度作为已验证完全格的元素，置信度通过已验证单调函数在依赖关系中传播；形式化五个IP用例，实现六个算法；核心算法在Lean 4中完全机器验证
AI.result: 开发了首个基于依赖类型理论的专利分析框架，DAG覆盖核心算法完全机器验证，结构引理、覆盖核心生成器和闭合路径恒等式已验证；高层定理保持非正式证明草图，但架构上缓解了证明生成函数
AI.conclusion: 该框架为专利分析提供了形式化验证基础，保证ML分数下游计算的数学正确性（而非分数本身的准确性）；未来工作包括对已裁决案例的验证

title: Beyond Coefficients: Forecast-Necessity Testing for Interpretable Causal Discovery in Nonlinear Time-Series Models
summary:
Nonlinear machine-learning models are increasingly used to discover causal relationships in time-series data, yet the interpretation of their outputs remains poorly understood. In particular, causal scores produced by regularized neural autoregressive models are often treated as analogues of regression coefficients, leading to misleading claims of statistical significance.
  In this paper, we argue that causal relevance in nonlinear time-series models should be evaluated through forecast necessity rather than coefficient magnitude, and we present a practical evaluation procedure for doing so. We present an interpretable evaluation framework based on systematic edge ablation and forecast comparison, which tests whether a candidate causal relationship is required for accurate prediction. Using Neural Additive Vector Autoregression as a case study model, we apply this framework to a real-world case study of democratic development, modeled as a multivariate time series of panel data - democracy indicators across 139 countries. We show that relationships with similar causal scores can differ dramatically in their predictive necessity due to redundancy, temporal persistence, and regime-specific effects.
  Our results demonstrate how forecast-necessity testing supports more reliable causal reasoning in applied AI systems and provides practical guidance for interpreting nonlinear time-series models in high-stakes domains.

AI.tldr: 提出基于预测必要性的非线性时间序列因果评估框架，替代传统的系数显著性检验
AI.motivation: 非线性机器学习模型在时间序列因果发现中的应用日益增多，但其输出解释仍不清晰。特别是正则化神经自回归模型产生的因果分数常被当作回归系数的类比，导致对统计显著性的误导性主张。
AI.method: 提出基于系统边消除和预测比较的可解释评估框架，通过预测必要性而非系数大小来评估因果相关性。以神经加性向量自回归为案例研究模型，应用于139个国家民主发展指标的多变量时间序列面板数据。
AI.result: 研究表明，具有相似因果分数的关系在预测必要性上可能存在显著差异，这归因于冗余性、时间持久性和特定制度效应。预测必要性测试支持更可靠的因果推理。
AI.conclusion: 预测必要性测试为应用AI系统中更可靠的因果推理提供了支持，并为高风险领域中非线性时间序列模型的解释提供了实用指导。

title: A semi-smooth Newton method for the nonlinear conic problem with generalized simplicial cones
summary: In this work we develop and analyze a semi-smooth Newton method for the general nonlinear conic programming problem. In particular, we study the problem with a generalized simplicial cone, i.e., the image of a symmetric cone under a linear mapping. We generalize Robinson's normal equations to a conic setting, yielding what we call the conic projection equations. The resulting system is equivalent to the KKT conditions associated with the nonlinear conic programming problem. A semi-smooth Newton iteration is proposed for solving it, and local quadratic convergence is established. We study properties of generalized simplicial cones and prove strong semi-smoothness of the projection operator onto them. Numerical experiments compare the method against a recent smoothing Newton approach on the circular cone programming problem, and we also apply it to the low-rank matrix completion problem.

AI.tldr: 提出并分析了一种求解非线性锥规划问题的半光滑牛顿法，特别针对广义单纯锥，建立了局部二次收敛性，并通过数值实验验证了方法有效性。
AI.motivation: 非线性锥规划问题在优化领域具有广泛应用，但现有求解方法存在局限性。本文旨在开发一种高效、理论保证的数值方法，特别针对广义单纯锥（对称锥在线性映射下的像）这类更一般的锥结构。
AI.method: 1. 将Robinson法方程推广到锥规划设置，提出锥投影方程系统，该系统等价于非线性锥规划问题的KKT条件；2. 设计半光滑牛顿迭代求解该方程系统；3. 研究广义单纯锥的性质，证明其投影算子的强半光滑性；4. 建立算法的局部二次收敛性理论。
AI.result: 1. 证明了锥投影方程与KKT条件的等价性；2. 建立了半光滑牛顿法的局部二次收敛性；3. 数值实验表明，在圆锥规划问题上，该方法优于最近的平滑牛顿方法；4. 成功应用于低秩矩阵补全问题，验证了方法的实际有效性。
AI.conclusion: 本文提出的半光滑牛顿法为求解广义单纯锥上的非线性锥规划问题提供了高效且理论保证的数值方法。该方法具有局部二次收敛性，数值实验验证了其优于现有平滑方法的性能，并在实际问题中展示了应用潜力。

title: Error-free Training for MedMNIST Datasets
summary: In this paper, we introduce a new concept called Artificial Special Intelligence by which Machine Learning models for the classification problem can be trained error-free, thus acquiring the capability of not making repeated mistakes. The method is applied to 18 MedMNIST biomedical datasets. Except for three datasets, which suffer from the double-labeling problem, all are trained to perfection.

AI.tldr: 提出"人工特殊智能"概念，使机器学习分类模型能够无错误训练，避免重复犯错，在MedMNIST生物医学数据集上验证效果
AI.motivation: 传统机器学习模型在训练过程中会犯重复错误，本文旨在开发一种能够实现无错误训练的方法，使模型能够避免重复犯错，提高分类准确性和可靠性
AI.method: 提出"人工特殊智能"概念，应用于18个MedMNIST生物医学数据集进行分类问题训练，该方法能够实现无错误训练
AI.result: 除了3个存在双重标注问题的数据集外，其余所有数据集都实现了完美训练，证明了该方法在避免重复错误方面的有效性
AI.conclusion: 人工特殊智能方法能够使机器学习分类模型实现无错误训练，有效避免重复犯错，在生物医学数据集上表现出色，为机器学习模型的可靠性提供了新思路

title: Handling and Interpreting Missing Modalities in Patient Clinical Trajectories via Autoregressive Sequence Modeling
summary: An active challenge in developing multimodal machine learning (ML) models for healthcare is handling missing modalities during training and deployment. As clinical datasets are inherently temporal and sparse in terms of modality presence, capturing the underlying predictive signal via diagnostic multimodal ML models while retaining model explainability remains an ongoing challenge. In this work, we address this by re-framing clinical diagnosis as an autoregressive sequence modeling task, utilizing causal decoders from large language models (LLMs) to model a patient's multimodal trajectory. We first introduce a missingness-aware contrastive pre-training objective that integrates multiple modalities in datasets with missingness in a shared latent space. We then show that autoregressive sequence modeling with transformer-based architectures outperforms baselines on the MIMIC-IV and eICU fine-tuning benchmarks. Finally, we use interpretability techniques to move beyond performance boosts and find that across various patient stays, removing modalities leads to divergent behavior that our contrastive pre-training mitigates. By abstracting clinical diagnosis as sequence modeling and interpreting patient stay trajectories, we develop a framework to profile and handle missing modalities while addressing the canonical desideratum of safe, transparent clinical AI.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出将临床诊断重构为自回归序列建模任务，利用LLM的因果解码器建模患者多模态轨迹，通过缺失感知对比预训练整合缺失模态，在MIMIC-IV和eICU基准上优于基线，并通过可解释性技术分析模态缺失的影响。
AI.motivation: 医疗多模态机器学习面临训练和部署时模态缺失的挑战，临床数据集具有时序性和模态稀疏性，需要在保持模型可解释性的同时捕捉预测信号。
AI.method: 1) 将临床诊断重构为自回归序列建模任务，利用大语言模型的因果解码器建模患者多模态轨迹；2) 引入缺失感知对比预训练目标，在共享潜在空间中整合具有缺失的多模态数据；3) 使用基于Transformer的架构进行自回归序列建模。
AI.result: 1) 在MIMIC-IV和eICU微调基准上，自回归序列建模优于基线方法；2) 通过可解释性技术发现，移除模态会导致模型行为发散，而对比预训练能缓解这一问题；3) 开发了分析和处理缺失模态的框架。
AI.conclusion: 通过将临床诊断抽象为序列建模并解释患者轨迹，开发了一个能够分析和处理缺失模态的框架，同时满足安全、透明临床AI的经典需求。

title: ParamBoost: Gradient Boosted Piecewise Cubic Polynomials
summary: Generalized Additive Models (GAMs) can be used to create non-linear glass-box (i.e. explicitly interpretable) models, where the predictive function is fully observable over the complete input space. However, glass-box interpretability itself does not allow for the incorporation of expert knowledge from the modeller. In this paper, we present ParamBoost, a novel GAM whose shape functions (i.e. mappings from individual input features to the output) are learnt using a Gradient Boosting algorithm that fits cubic polynomial functions at leaf nodes. ParamBoost incorporates several constraints commonly used in parametric analysis to ensure well-refined shape functions. These constraints include: (i) continuity of the shape functions and their derivatives (up to C2); (ii) monotonicity; (iii) convexity; (iv) feature interaction constraints; and (v) model specification constraints. Empirical results show that the unconstrained ParamBoost model consistently outperforms state-of-the-art GAMs across several real-world datasets. We further demonstrate that modellers can selectively impose required constraints at a modest trade-off in predictive performance, allowing the model to be fully tailored to application-specific interpretability and parametric-analysis requirements.

AI.tldr: ParamBoost是一种新型广义可加模型，使用梯度提升算法学习三次多项式形状函数，可灵活加入多种约束条件以整合专家知识，在保持可解释性的同时提升预测性能。
AI.motivation: 传统广义可加模型虽然具有玻璃盒可解释性，但无法整合建模者的专家知识。需要一种既能保持完全可观察性，又能融入领域专家约束的模型。
AI.method: 提出ParamBoost方法：使用梯度提升算法学习形状函数，叶节点拟合三次多项式函数。可选择性施加五种约束：(i)形状函数及其导数连续性(C2)；(ii)单调性；(iii)凸性；(iv)特征交互约束；(v)模型规范约束。
AI.result: 无约束ParamBoost模型在多个真实数据集上持续优于最先进的GAMs。选择性施加约束仅需适度牺牲预测性能，使模型能完全适应特定应用的可解释性和参数分析需求。
AI.conclusion: ParamBoost成功将专家知识整合到可解释模型中，在保持玻璃盒可解释性的同时，通过约束条件实现领域特定建模，为参数分析提供灵活框架。

title: Capacity Expansion Planning for Puerto Rico's Electric Power System
summary:
This study presents a mathematical optimization framework and preliminary analysis for long-term investment planning in Puerto Rico's electric power system. We develop a high-resolution capacity expansion model to identify least-cost generation and storage investments that improve system reliability. The model co-optimizes new investments and thermal generator retirements while representing generator dispatch, unit commitment, fuel selection, and storage operations under constraints of equipment engineering limits, fuel supply limitations, and load satisfaction.
  Key methodological advances relative to prior long-term planning studies for Puerto Rico include: (i) nodal transmission modeling at 38 kV and above, (ii) hourly chronological operations for representative days, (iii) explicit unit commitment for existing and new thermal units with realistic ramping, minimum up and down times, and startup costs, (iv) system-wide fuel supply constraints, and (v) stochastic operating scenarios reflecting load variation, renewable availability, and the high forced outage rates of legacy units.
  Using data from LUMA, PREPA, DOE, and public sources, we build present-day (2024) and future (2030) test systems, with the latter including planned generation and storage projects. We evaluate planning scenarios that vary future load, fuel supply assumptions, realization of planned expansion, and allowable new technologies. Results show that, given the recent relaxation of interim renewable goals for the near future in Puerto Rico, an optimal portfolio includes at least 1.5 GW of new H-class combined cycle capacity beyond planned projects. These additions are needed mainly to replace unreliable legacy thermal units rather than to serve new load. The new combined cycle units eliminate modeled bulk-system load shedding and restore a strong reserve margin, even under stressed load and outage conditions.

AI.tldr: 开发了波多黎各电力系统的长期投资规划优化框架，通过高分辨率容量扩展模型识别最低成本的发电和储能投资方案，以提升系统可靠性。
AI.motivation: 为波多黎各电力系统提供科学的长期投资规划方法，解决现有系统可靠性不足、老旧机组故障率高、可再生能源目标调整后的最优投资组合问题。
AI.method: 建立高分辨率容量扩展模型，包含节点传输建模、小时级时序运行、显式机组组合、系统燃料供应约束和随机运行场景，使用LUMA、PREPA、DOE等数据构建2024和2030测试系统。
AI.result: 最优投资组合显示需要额外建设至少1.5GW的H级联合循环机组，主要用于替代不可靠的老旧机组而非满足新增负荷，这些新增机组可消除系统负荷削减并恢复强健的备用裕度。
AI.conclusion: 在波多黎各近期可再生能源目标放宽的背景下，新增联合循环容量对提升系统可靠性至关重要，该优化框架为长期投资决策提供了科学依据。

title: AutomationBench
summary: Existing AI benchmarks for software automation rarely combine cross-application coordination, autonomous API discovery, and policy adherence. Real business workflows demand all three: a single task may span a CRM, inbox, calendar, and messaging platform - requiring the agent to find the right endpoints, follow a policy document, and write correct data to each system. To address this gap, we introduce AutomationBench, a benchmark for evaluating AI agents on cross-application workflow orchestration via REST APIs. Drawing on real workflow patterns from Zapier's platform, tasks span Sales, Marketing, Operations, Support, Finance, and HR domains. Agents must discover relevant endpoints themselves, follow layered business rules, and navigate environments with irrelevant and sometimes misleading records. Grading is programmatic and end-state only: whether the correct data ended up in the right systems. Even the best frontier models currently score below 10%. AutomationBench provides a challenging, realistic measure of where current models stand relative to the agentic capabilities businesses actually need.

AI.tldr: AutomationBench：通过REST API评估AI代理在跨应用工作流编排能力的基准测试，基于真实业务场景，要求代理自主发现API端点、遵循业务策略，当前前沿模型得分低于10%
AI.motivation: 现有AI基准测试在软件自动化方面很少结合跨应用协调、自主API发现和策略遵循这三个关键要素。真实业务工作流需要同时具备这三者：单个任务可能跨越CRM、收件箱、日历和消息平台，要求代理找到正确的端点、遵循策略文档并向每个系统写入正确数据。
AI.method: 引入AutomationBench基准测试，基于Zapier平台的真实工作流模式构建。任务涵盖销售、营销、运营、支持、财务和人力资源等领域。代理必须自主发现相关端点、遵循分层业务规则，并在包含无关甚至误导性记录的环境中导航。评估采用程序化且仅关注最终状态的方式：检查正确数据是否最终出现在正确的系统中。
AI.result: 即使目前最好的前沿模型在AutomationBench上的得分也低于10%，表明当前模型在满足实际业务需求的代理能力方面仍有巨大差距。
AI.conclusion: AutomationBench提供了一个具有挑战性且贴近现实的衡量标准，能够准确评估当前模型相对于企业实际需要的代理能力水平，揭示了现有AI系统在复杂业务工作流自动化方面的局限性。

title: Towards Understanding the Robustness of Sparse Autoencoders
summary: Large Language Models (LLMs) remain vulnerable to optimization-based jailbreak attacks that exploit internal gradient structure. While Sparse Autoencoders (SAEs) are widely used for interpretability, their robustness implications remain underexplored. We present a study of integrating pretrained SAEs into transformer residual streams at inference time, without modifying model weights or blocking gradients. Across four model families (Gemma, LLaMA, Mistral, Qwen) and two strong white-box attacks (GCG, BEAST) plus three black-box benchmarks, SAE-augmented models achieve up to a 5x reduction in jailbreak success rate relative to the undefended baseline and reduce cross-model attack transferability. Parametric ablations reveal (i) a monotonic dose-response relationship between L0 sparsity and attack success rate, and (ii) a layer-dependent defense-utility tradeoff, where intermediate layers balance robustness and clean performance. These findings are consistent with a representational bottleneck hypothesis: sparse projection reshapes the optimization geometry exploited by jailbreak attacks.

AI.tldr: SAE增强LLM推理时防御梯度攻击，降低越狱成功率5倍，减少跨模型攻击转移性
AI.motivation: LLM对基于优化的越狱攻击仍然脆弱，而稀疏自编码器(SAE)在可解释性中广泛应用但其鲁棒性影响尚未充分探索
AI.method: 在推理时将预训练SAE集成到transformer残差流中，不修改模型权重或阻断梯度，在四个模型家族和多种攻击下测试
AI.result: SAE增强模型相比未防御基线降低越狱成功率达5倍，减少跨模型攻击转移性；L0稀疏度与攻击成功率呈单调剂量反应关系，中间层在鲁棒性和清洁性能间平衡
AI.conclusion: 稀疏投影重塑了越狱攻击利用的优化几何结构，支持表示瓶颈假说，SAE集成是有效的防御策略

title: Local Linearity of LLMs Enables Activation Steering via Model-Based Linear Optimal Control
summary: Inference-time LLM alignment methods, particularly activation steering, offer an alternative to fine-tuning by directly modifying activations during generation. Existing methods, however, often rely on non-anticipative interventions that ignore how perturbations propagate through transformer layers and lack online error feedback, resulting in suboptimal, open-loop control. To address this, we show empirically that, despite the nonlinear structure of transformer blocks, layer-wise dynamics across multiple LLM architectures and scales are well-approximated by locally-linear models. Exploiting this property, we model LLM inference as a linear time-varying dynamical system and adapt the classical linear quadratic regulator to compute feedback controllers using layer-wise Jacobians, steering activations toward desired semantic setpoints in closed-loop with minimal computational overhead and no offline training. We also derive theoretical bounds on setpoint tracking error, enabling formal guarantees on steering performance. Using a novel adaptive semantic feature setpoint signal, our method yields robust, fine-grained behavior control across models, scales, and tasks, including state-of-the-art modulation of toxicity, truthfulness, refusal, and arbitrary concepts, surpassing baseline steering methods. Our code is available at: https://github.com/trustworthyrobotics/lqr-activation-steering

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于线性二次调节器（LQR）的闭环激活引导方法，将LLM推理建模为线性时变动力系统，通过层间雅可比矩阵计算反馈控制器，实现语义设定点的精确跟踪。
AI.motivation: 现有推理时LLM对齐方法（特别是激活引导）存在两个主要问题：1）使用非预期性干预，忽略扰动在Transformer层间的传播；2）缺乏在线误差反馈，导致次优的开环控制。需要一种能够考虑动态传播并提供反馈的闭环控制方法。
AI.method: 1）经验证明Transformer块的层间动态可被局部线性模型良好近似；2）将LLM推理建模为线性时变动力系统；3）采用经典线性二次调节器（LQR）框架，利用层间雅可比矩阵计算反馈控制器；4）设计自适应语义特征设定点信号；5）推导设定点跟踪误差的理论边界。
AI.result: 方法在多个LLM架构和规模上实现了鲁棒、细粒度的行为控制，包括毒性、真实性、拒绝和任意概念的调制，性能超越基线引导方法。计算开销最小且无需离线训练。
AI.conclusion: 通过将LLM推理建模为线性动力系统并应用LQR控制理论，实现了具有理论保证的闭环激活引导，为推理时对齐提供了更优的解决方案。

title: A Data-embedded Solution Paradigm for Nonconvex Probable Event Constrained Optimization
summary: This paper introduces a new modeling framework for optimization under uncertainty, called Probable Event Constrained Optimization (PECO). Unlike conventional chance-constrained formulations, which only limit the probability of constraint violation, PECO also explicitly requires feasibility for all events whose probability exceeds a prescribed threshold. This guarantees that solutions remain valid across all high-probability realizations of uncertainty. To solve PECO, we proposed a data-embedded program (DEP) which directly incorporates historical measurements of the uncertain parameters to obtain a deterministic approximation for PECO. While existing solution methods for optimization problems under uncertainty rely heavily on convexity or linearity assumptions, the proposed data-embedded solution paradigm provides a unique opportunity for solving nonlinear and nonconvex PECOs. The effectiveness of this approach depends on properly estimating the number of elements in the family of solution-determining data sets. As we enter the era of big data, this information can be properly estimated by leveraging the power of machine learning.

AI.tldr: 提出概率事件约束优化(PECO)新框架，不仅限制约束违反概率，还要求对所有超过阈值概率的事件保持可行性，并通过数据嵌入程序(DEP)结合历史数据求解非线性非凸PECO问题
AI.motivation: 传统机会约束优化仅限制约束违反概率，但无法保证在高概率不确定性实现下的可行性。需要一种新框架来确保解决方案在所有高概率不确定性情景下都有效
AI.method: 提出概率事件约束优化(PECO)框架，要求对所有概率超过预设阈值的事件保持可行性。开发数据嵌入程序(DEP)，直接结合不确定参数的历史测量数据，为PECO提供确定性近似。利用机器学习在大数据时代估计解确定数据集族中的元素数量
AI.result: PECO框架提供了比传统机会约束更强的可行性保证。DEP方法为求解非线性和非凸PECO问题提供了新途径，突破了现有方法对凸性或线性假设的依赖
AI.conclusion: PECO框架为不确定性下的优化提供了更严格的可行性保证，DEP结合机器学习的方法为解决复杂非线性非凸优化问题开辟了新方向，特别适合大数据环境下的应用

title: Personalized Benchmarking: Evaluating LLMs by Individual Preferences
summary: With the rise in capabilities of large language models (LLMs) and their deployment in real-world tasks, evaluating LLM alignment with human preferences has become an important challenge. Current benchmarks average preferences across all users to compute aggregate ratings, overlooking individual user preferences when establishing model rankings. Since users have varying preferences in different contexts, we call for personalized LLM benchmarks that rank models according to individual needs. We compute personalized model rankings using ELO ratings and Bradley-Terry coefficients for 115 active Chatbot Arena users and analyze how user query characteristics (topics and writing style) relate to LLM ranking variations. We demonstrate that individual rankings of LLM models diverge dramatically from aggregate LLM rankings, with Bradley-Terry correlations averaging only $ρ= 0.04$ (57\% of users show near-zero or negative correlation) and ELO ratings showing moderate correlation ($ρ= 0.43$). Through topic modeling and style analysis, we find users exhibit substantial heterogeneity in topical interests and communication styles, influencing their model preferences. We further show that a compact combination of topic and style features provides a useful feature space for predicting user-specific model rankings. Our results provide strong quantitative evidence that aggregate benchmarks fail to capture individual preferences for most users, and highlight the importance of developing personalized benchmarks that rank LLM models according to individual user preferences.

AI.tldr: 该论文提出个性化LLM基准测试的重要性，指出当前聚合基准无法反映个体用户偏好，通过分析115名Chatbot Arena用户的个性化模型排名，发现个体排名与聚合排名差异显著，并证明主题和风格特征可用于预测用户特定模型排名。
AI.motivation: 随着大语言模型能力的提升和在现实任务中的部署，评估LLM与人类偏好的对齐性成为重要挑战。当前基准测试通过平均所有用户的偏好来计算聚合评分，忽视了在建立模型排名时的个体用户偏好。由于用户在不同情境下有不同偏好，需要个性化LLM基准来根据个体需求对模型进行排名。
AI.method: 使用ELO评分和Bradley-Terry系数为115名活跃的Chatbot Arena用户计算个性化模型排名。分析用户查询特征（主题和写作风格）与LLM排名变化的关系。通过主题建模和风格分析，识别用户偏好的异质性。进一步展示主题和风格特征的紧凑组合可为预测用户特定模型排名提供有用的特征空间。
AI.result: 个体LLM模型排名与聚合LLM排名存在显著差异：Bradley-Terry相关性平均仅为ρ=0.04（57%的用户显示接近零或负相关性），ELO评分显示中等相关性（ρ=0.43）。用户表现出在主题兴趣和沟通风格上的显著异质性，这影响了他们的模型偏好。紧凑的主题和风格特征组合为预测用户特定模型排名提供了有用的特征空间。
AI.conclusion: 聚合基准测试无法捕捉大多数用户的个体偏好，强调了开发个性化基准测试的重要性，这些基准应根据个体用户偏好对LLM模型进行排名。研究结果为个性化LLM评估提供了强有力的定量证据。

title: Multi-Level Temporal Graph Networks with Local-Global Fusion for Industrial Fault Diagnosis
summary: Fault detection and diagnosis are critical for the optimal and safe operation of industrial processes. The correlations among sensors often display non-Euclidean structures where graph neural networks (GNNs) are widely used therein. However, for large-scale systems, local, global, and dynamic relations extensively exist among sensors, and traditional GNNs often overlook such complex and multi-level structures for various problems including the fault diagnosis. To address this issue, we propose a structure-aware multi-level temporal graph network with local-global feature fusion for industrial fault diagnosis. First, a correlation graph is dynamically constructed using Pearson correlation coefficients to capture relationships among process variables. Then, temporal features are extracted through long short-term memory (LSTM)-based encoder, whereas the spatial dependencies among sensors are learned by graph convolution layers. A multi-level pooling mechanism is used to gradually coarsen and learn meaningful graph structures, to capture higher-level patterns while keeping important fault related details. Finally, a fusion step is applied to combine both detailed local features and overall global patterns before the final prediction. Experimental evaluations on the Tennessee Eastman process (TEP) demonstrate that the proposed model achieves superior fault diagnosis performance, particularly for complex fault scenarios, outperforming various baseline methods.

AI.tldr: 提出了一种用于工业故障诊断的结构感知多级时序图网络，通过局部-全局特征融合处理传感器间的复杂多层次关系
AI.motivation: 工业过程中传感器间存在局部、全局和动态的复杂非欧几里得关系，传统图神经网络难以捕捉这种多层次结构，影响故障诊断性能
AI.method: 1) 使用皮尔逊相关系数动态构建相关图；2) LSTM编码器提取时序特征；3) 图卷积层学习空间依赖；4) 多级池化机制逐步粗化图结构；5) 局部-全局特征融合
AI.result: 在田纳西伊斯曼过程(TEP)上的实验表明，该模型在故障诊断性能上优于多种基线方法，尤其在复杂故障场景中表现优异
AI.conclusion: 提出的结构感知多级时序图网络能够有效捕捉工业过程中的多层次时空关系，通过局部-全局特征融合显著提升了故障诊断性能

title: S2MAM: Semi-supervised Meta Additive Model for Robust Estimation and Variable Selection
summary: Semi-supervised learning with manifold regularization is a classical framework for jointly learning from both labeled and unlabeled data, where the key requirement is that the support of the unknown marginal distribution has the geometric structure of a Riemannian manifold. Typically, the Laplace-Beltrami operator-based manifold regularization can be approximated empirically by the Laplacian regularization associated with the entire training data and its corresponding graph Laplacian matrix. However, the graph Laplacian matrix depends heavily on the prespecified similarity metric and may lead to inappropriate penalties when dealing with redundant or noisy input variables. To address the above issues, this paper proposes a new \textit{Semi-Supervised Meta Additive Model (S$^2$MAM) based on a bilevel optimization scheme that automatically identifies informative variables, updates the similarity matrix, and simultaneously achieves interpretable predictions. Theoretical guarantees are provided for S$^2$MAM, including the computing convergence and the statistical generalization bound. Experimental assessments across 4 synthetic and 12 real-world datasets, with varying levels and categories of corruption, validate the robustness and interpretability of the proposed approach.

AI.tldr: 提出S²MAM半监督元加性模型，通过双层优化自动识别信息变量、更新相似矩阵，实现可解释预测，解决传统流形正则化对相似度度量和噪声变量的依赖问题。
AI.motivation: 传统流形正则化方法依赖预设的相似度度量构建图拉普拉斯矩阵，在处理冗余或噪声变量时可能导致不恰当的惩罚，需要更鲁棒且可解释的半监督学习方法。
AI.method: 提出S²MAM半监督元加性模型，采用双层优化框架：内层优化预测模型，外层优化变量选择和相似矩阵更新，实现自动识别信息变量和自适应相似度度量。
AI.result: 在4个合成数据集和12个真实数据集上验证，S²MAM在不同类型和程度的噪声污染下表现出鲁棒性和可解释性，优于传统方法。
AI.conclusion: S²MAM通过双层优化有效解决了传统流形正则化对相似度度量的依赖问题，实现了自动变量选择、自适应相似矩阵更新和可解释预测，具有理论保证和实际应用价值。

title: Optimal Online and Offline Algorithms for Contextual MNL with Applications to Assortment and Pricing
comment: This is an extended version of the paper "Improved Confidence Regions and Optimal Algorithms for Online and Offline Linear MNL Bandits," accepted to NeurIPS 2025
summary: Selecting which products to display and at what prices is a central decision in retail and e-commerce operations. In many applications, these two choices must be made jointly under limited display capacity and uncertain customer demand. In this paper, we study the joint assortment and pricing problem under a price-based contextual multinomial logit model, where customer preferences depend on both product features and selling prices. Our analysis begins with the construction of a new confidence region for demand estimation under price-dependent features. Building on this result, we develop a pessimistic offline algorithm and SupCB-type online algorithms for joint assortment and pricing optimization. In the offline setting, we establish a suboptimality guarantee governed by local information around the optimal assortment-price pair, rather than by exact coverage of the optimal action. In the online setting, our SupCB-type algorithm improves the best previously known regret bound to $\widetilde{O}(W\sqrt{dT\log N}/L_0)$, and we also provide a computationally simpler Thompson-sampling alternative. When specialized to the assortment-only or pricing-only setting, our bounds recover the near-minimax-optimal rates established in those respective domains, thereby bridging the gap between the mature study on assortment optimization or dynamic pricing and the limited literature on their joint optimization.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了零售和电商中联合品类选择与定价的优化问题，提出了在价格依赖特征下的新需求估计方法，并开发了离线和在线算法，改进了现有理论边界。
AI.motivation: 零售和电商运营中，在有限的展示容量和不确定客户需求下，需要同时决定展示哪些产品以及如何定价。现有研究主要集中在单独的品类优化或动态定价，而联合优化的文献相对有限，需要填补这一空白。
AI.method: 1. 构建了价格依赖特征下的新需求估计置信区域；2. 开发了悲观的离线算法；3. 提出了SupCB类型的在线算法；4. 提供了计算更简单的Thompson采样替代方案。
AI.result: 1. 离线设置中建立了由最优品类-价格对周围局部信息控制的次优性保证；2. 在线设置中SupCB算法将最佳已知遗憾边界改进到$\widetilde{O}(W\sqrt{dT\log N}/L_0)$；3. 在单独的品类优化或定价场景中，边界恢复到了各自领域的最优速率。
AI.conclusion: 该研究填补了成熟的品类优化或动态定价研究与有限的联合优化文献之间的空白，提供了在价格依赖特征下联合品类选择和定价的理论保证和实用算法。

title: Reasoning Structure Matters for Safety Alignment of Reasoning Models
summary: Large reasoning models (LRMs) achieve strong performance on complex reasoning tasks but often generate harmful responses to malicious user queries. This paper investigates the underlying cause of these safety risks and shows that the issue lies in the reasoning structure itself. Based on this insight, we claim that effective safety alignment can be achieved by altering the reasoning structure. We propose AltTrain, a simple yet effective post training method that explicitly alters the reasoning structure of LRMs. AltTrain is both practical and generalizable, requiring no complex reinforcement learning (RL) training or reward design, only supervised finetuning (SFT) with a lightweight 1K training examples. Experiments across LRM backbones and model sizes demonstrate strong safety alignment, along with robust generalization across reasoning, QA, summarization, and multilingual setting.

AI.tldr: AltTrain：一种通过改变推理结构来提升大型推理模型安全性的后训练方法，仅需1K监督微调样本即可实现有效安全对齐
AI.motivation: 大型推理模型在复杂推理任务上表现优异，但面对恶意用户查询时经常生成有害响应。研究发现问题的根源在于推理结构本身，因此通过改变推理结构可以实现有效的安全对齐。
AI.method: 提出AltTrain方法，这是一种简单有效的后训练方法，通过监督微调（SFT）显式改变大型推理模型的推理结构。该方法不需要复杂的强化学习训练或奖励设计，仅需1K轻量级训练样本。
AI.result: 实验在不同骨干模型和模型规模上验证了AltTrain的有效性，显示出强大的安全对齐能力，并在推理、问答、摘要和多语言设置中展现出鲁棒的泛化性能。
AI.conclusion: 通过改变推理结构可以实现大型推理模型的安全对齐，AltTrain方法提供了一种实用且可泛化的解决方案，仅需少量监督微调样本即可显著提升模型安全性。

title: Streaming Structured Inference with Flash-SemiCRF
summary: Semi-Markov Conditional Random Fields (semi-CRFs) assign labels to segments of a sequence rather than to individual positions, enabling exact inference over segment-level features and principled uncertainty estimates at their boundaries. However, existing implementations must materialize a large edge potential tensor whose size grows with sequence length, maximum segment length, and label count, becoming prohibitive for speech-scale state spaces and intractable at genomic scales where sequences can exceed 100,000 positions. This memory bottleneck has limited the adoption of exact segment-level inference for long sequences and large label sets. We identify that the core inefficiency is materializing edge potentials that can instead be evaluated on-the-fly from a compact prefix-sum array, and make several improvements. First, replacing the stored edge tensor with prefix-sum lookup reduces the memory footprint by a factor proportional to the product of segment length and label count. Second, a streaming forward-backward pass with checkpoint-boundary normalization keeps working memory sublinear in sequence length while preserving exact gradients. Third, zero-centered cumulative scores control numerical drift and induce an adaptive duration prior under label imbalance. We integrate these ideas into Flash-SemiCRF, a fused Triton kernel that enables exact semi-CRF inference on previously intractable problem sizes. Available at https://github.com/biobenkj/flash-semicrf.

AI.tldr: Flash-SemiCRF：通过前缀和查找、流式前向后向传递和零中心累积分数，实现内存高效的精确半CRF推理，解决了长序列和大标签集的内存瓶颈问题。
AI.motivation: 现有半CRF实现需要存储大型边势能张量，其大小随序列长度、最大段长度和标签数量增长，在语音规模状态空间和基因组规模序列（超过10万位置）下变得不可行，限制了精确段级推理在长序列和大标签集上的应用。
AI.method: 1. 用前缀和查找替代存储的边张量，将内存占用减少与段长度和标签数量乘积成比例；2. 使用检查点边界归一化的流式前向后向传递，保持工作内存与序列长度呈亚线性关系，同时保留精确梯度；3. 零中心累积分数控制数值漂移，在标签不平衡下引入自适应持续时间先验。这些方法集成到Flash-SemiCRF，一个融合的Triton内核中。
AI.result: Flash-SemiCRF能够在先前难以处理的问题规模上实现精确的半CRF推理，解决了内存瓶颈问题，使精确段级推理能够应用于长序列和大标签集场景。
AI.conclusion: 通过创新的内存优化技术，Flash-SemiCRF突破了半CRF推理的内存限制，为在语音和基因组等大规模序列数据上应用精确的段级推理提供了可行的解决方案。

title: Heterogeneity-Aware Personalized Federated Learning for Industrial Predictive Analytics
summary: Federated prognostics enable clients (e.g., companies, factories, and production lines) to collaboratively develop a failure time prediction model while keeping each client's data local and confidential. However, traditional federated models often assume homogeneity in the degradation processes across clients, an assumption that may not hold in many industrial settings. To overcome this, this paper proposes a personalized federated prognostic model designed to accommodate clients with heterogeneous degradation processes, allowing them to build tailored prognostic models. The prognostic model iteratively facilitates the underlying pairwise collaborations between clients with similar degradation patterns, which enhances the performance of personalized federated learning. To estimate parameters jointly using decentralized datasets, we develop a federated parameter estimation algorithm based on proximal gradient descent. The proposed approach addresses the limitations of existing federated prognostic models by simultaneously achieving model personalization, preserving data privacy, and providing comprehensive failure time distributions. The superiority of the proposed model is validated through extensive simulation studies and a case study using the turbofan engine degradation dataset from the NASA repository.

AI.tldr: 提出个性化联邦预测模型，解决传统联邦学习假设退化过程同质性的问题，允许客户端构建定制化预测模型，同时保持数据隐私。
AI.motivation: 传统联邦预测模型通常假设客户端间退化过程同质，但工业场景中退化过程往往存在异质性。现有模型无法同时满足个性化建模、数据隐私保护和完整故障时间分布估计的需求。
AI.method: 提出个性化联邦预测模型，通过迭代促进具有相似退化模式的客户端间成对协作。开发基于近端梯度下降的联邦参数估计算法，使用分散数据集联合估计参数。
AI.result: 通过大量仿真研究和NASA涡轮风扇发动机退化数据集案例验证了模型优越性。模型同时实现了模型个性化、数据隐私保护和完整故障时间分布估计。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法克服了现有联邦预测模型的局限性，为具有异质退化过程的客户端提供了有效的个性化联邦预测解决方案，在保持数据隐私的同时提升了预测性能。

title: Exact Quadratic Penalty Function for Symplectic Eigenvalue Problem
summary: The symplectic eigenvalue problem for symmetric positive-definite (spd) matrices plays a crucial role in various scientific fields, including quantum mechanics and control theory. This paper introduces a trace-penalty minimization method, which transforms the symplectic eigenvalue problem into the unconstrained minimization of the trace-penalty function. We prove the equivalence between the penalty problem and the original constrained optimization problem under mild conditions, in the sense that the second-order stationary points of the trace-penalty function correspond to the solutions of the symplectic eigenvalue problem. Moreover, we develop an algorithm to minimize the trace-penalty function efficiently, which follows the scheme of gradient methods, together with the Barzilai-Borwein (BB) adaptive step-size rule and non-monotone line-search technique. Numerical experiments demonstrate that the proposed algorithm outperforms a wide range of existing methods, such as Riemannian gradient-based methods, in terms of computational efficiency and convergence rate for dense, sparse, and sparse-add-low-rank matrices. These numerical results further demonstrate the great potential of our proposed algorithm, especially in solving large-scale symplectic eigenvalue problems.

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于迹惩罚最小化的方法求解对称正定矩阵的辛特征值问题，将约束优化转化为无约束最小化，并开发了结合BB步长和非单调线搜索的高效梯度算法。
AI.motivation: 辛特征值问题在量子力学和控制理论等领域具有重要应用，但现有方法（如黎曼梯度法）在计算效率和收敛速度方面存在局限，特别是对于大规模问题。
AI.method: 将辛特征值问题转化为迹惩罚函数的无约束最小化问题，证明两者在温和条件下的等价性。开发基于梯度法的算法，结合Barzilai-Borwein自适应步长规则和非单调线搜索技术。
AI.result: 数值实验表明，所提算法在计算效率和收敛速度上优于多种现有方法（包括黎曼梯度法），适用于稠密、稀疏和稀疏加低秩矩阵，特别在大规模辛特征值问题上表现出巨大潜力。
AI.conclusion: 迹惩罚最小化方法为求解辛特征值问题提供了有效框架，所开发的算法在效率和收敛性方面具有显著优势，特别适合大规模应用场景。

title: DW-Bench: Benchmarking LLMs on Data Warehouse Graph Topology Reasoning
comment: 24 pages, 6 figures. Datasets and evaluation code available at GitHub
